title: Angular Service Worker Options Schema
description: Pass this schematic to the "run" command to create a service worker

project.description: Adds a service worker to your project. Service workers enable your application to work offline or on low-quality networks by caching assets and intercepting network requests. This schematic configures your project to use a service worker.
The name of the project to add the service worker to. If not specified, the CLI will determine the project from the current directory.

target.description: The target to apply service worker to.
The build target to apply the service worker to. This is typically `build`, indicating that the service worker should be generated during the standard build process.
